title: Jensen Drops the Hammer at Computex 2026 — NVIDIA's Vera Rubin Platform and Arizona Fab Redraw the AI Map
subtitle: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang used his Computex 2026 keynote to confirm Vera Rubin is ramping into full production — delivering 10x agent throughput over Gr
summary: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang used his Computex 2026 keynote to confirm Vera Rubin is ramping into full production — delivering 10x agent throughput over Grace Blackwell — and announced a joint TSMC partner

bodyHtml: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang used his Computex 2026 keynote to confirm Vera Rubin is ramping into full production — delivering 10x agent throughput over Grace Blackwell — and announced a joint TSMC partner
